title: Kadhal Kaditham Song Lyrics Jodi
stanzas:
[Kadhal kaditham theettave
megam ellaam kaagitham
vaanin neelam konduvaa
paena maiyo theernthidum

chandhiranum sooriyanum
anjal kaarargal
iravu pagal eppozhuthum
anjal unnai sernthidum ](2)

Kadhal kaditham theettave
megam ellaam kaagitham
vaanin neelam konduvaa
paena maiyo theernthidum

Kadithathain vaarthaigalil
kannaa naan vazhugiren
paenaavil ootri vaithathu
enthan uyirallo..

ponne un kadithathai
poovaale thirakkindren
viral pattaal undhan jeevan
kaayam padumallao

anbae undhan anbil
aadip poginren
sempookkal theendumpodhu
sethu sethu poo pookkiren.

Kannae un kaal kolusil
maniyaaga maattenaa
manjathil urangum podhu
sinunga maattenaa

kaalodu kolusallaa
kannodu uyiraanaai
uyire naan urangum podhum
uranga maattaayaa?

thappu seiyya paarthaal
oppukkolvaayaa ?
maelaadai neengum podhu
vetkam enna munthaanaiyaa

Kadhal kaditham theettave
megam ellaam kaagitham
vaanin neelam konduvaa
paena maiyo theernthidum

chandhiranum sooriyanum
anjal kaarargal
iravu pagal eppozhuthum
anjal unnai sernthidum

Kadhal kaditham theettave
megam ellaam kaagitham
vaanin neelam konduvaa
paena maiyo theernthidum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kadhal Kaditham?

The song beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing, using poetic imagery to convey the depth of feelings between lovers.

Who composed the music for the movie Jodi?

The music for Jodi was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Kaditham?

The song is sung by S. Janaki and Unni Menon, whose voices perfectly complement the romantic mood.

When was the movie Jodi released?

The movie Jodi was released in the year 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadhal Kaditham from the movie Jodi is a heartfelt expression of love and longing. Set against a backdrop of poetic imagery, it beautifully conveys the emotions of lovers separated by distance. The soothing melody, composed by A.R. Rahman, is enriched by the soulful voices of S. Janaki and Unni Menon. This classic duet evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance, making it a timeless favorite for those in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kadhal Kaditham from the movie Jodi. This enchanting melody, penned by Vairamuthu and brought to life by A.R. Rahman's soulful composition, captures the essence of love and longing. Let the voices of S. Janaki and Unni Menon transport you to a world of romance and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: To deliver the love letter, all the clouds become paper, bringing the sky's blue, and the pen finishes writing.
The moon and the sun are the postmen, day and night they always deliver the letter to you.
To deliver the love letter, all the clouds become paper, bringing the sky's blue, and the pen finishes writing.
In the words of the letter, I slip, what I wrote with the pen is my life.
Dear, I open your letter with a flower, if my finger touches, your life will be hurt.
My love, I dance in your affection, when the red flowers touch, I bloom and bloom.
Dear, I won't become the bell on your anklet, I won't jingle when you sleep on the floor.
With the anklet on your leg, I am your life, will you not sleep when I sleep?
If you see me make a mistake, will you accept it? When the top cloth is removed, why the shyness?
To deliver the love letter, all the clouds become paper, bringing the sky's blue, and the pen finishes writing.
The moon and the sun are the postmen, day and night they always deliver the letter to you.
To deliver the love letter, all the clouds become paper, bringing the sky's blue, and the pen finishes writing.
